prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock GW4N20 (1.5L turbocharged inline-4) internals with forged Mahle pistons (8.5:1 compression), Manley H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from JE Pistons to handle 400+ HP reliably. Pair with a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger (0.82 A/R, 62mm compressor) and a custom 3.5-inch turbo-back exhaust system from Milltek Sport with 200-cell catalytic converters for Euro 6d compliance.

Drivetrain: Install a Sachs Performance dual-mass flywheel and uprated clutch kit (Stage 2+) with a 6-paddle design, mated to a Getrag 7DCL750 7-speed DCT transmission tuned via a Cobb Accessport for launch control and shift-time reductions to 120ms. Add a Cusco 1.5-way limited-slip differential with 45% preload for the front axle (AWD variant only).

Suspension/Handling: Replace the OEM struts with a full Öhlins Road & Track DFV kit (coilovers) featuring 24-way adjustable compression/rebound damping, 30mm adjustable ride height, and spherical top mounts. Add a full Whiteline chassis stiffening kit (subframe collars, strut braces, and rear sway bar with adjustable end links) and Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (255/35R20 front, 285/30R20 rear) on OZ Racing Ultraleggera HLT wheels (9x20 ET35 front, 10.5x20 ET40 rear).
estetica: Aerodynamics: Install a full Liberty Walk LB Works widebody kit (Coffee 01-specific) with carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and a ducktail spoiler. Add a custom 3D-printed active rear diffuser from Vorsteiner with integrated LED brake cooling ducts. Front splitter must be a 9-piece adjustable carbon fiber unit from Seibon with 30mm overhang for 50kg+ downforce at 120mph.

Exterior: Full 3M Matte Military Green (S282) vinyl wrap with a satin clear coat from Avery Dennison. Replace all chrome trim with gloss black PVD-coated parts from LUX Auto. Add custom LED headlight projectors from Morimoto (FX-R 3.0, 5500K) with sequential turn signals and a Diode Dynamics SS3 Pro LED fog light kit.

Interior: Replace the stock seats with Recaro Pole Position bucket seats (carbon fiber backs, FIA-approved) and Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses. Add a full carbon fiber dash overlay from V Carbon, a custom Alcantara-wrapped MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel with a quick-release hub, and a digital dash from AIM MXS Strada (12-inch display) with CAN bus integration for real-time turbo/boost data.
